title: Seedance 2.0 — Text to Video
description: AtlasCloud / ByteDance Seedance 2.0 — generates video from text with native audio. Supports adaptive aspect ratio.

fields.name: prompt
fields.title: Prompt
fields.description: Text prompt describing the desired video (English or Chinese).

fields.name: duration
fields.title: Duration (seconds)
fields.description: Video duration in seconds. -1 lets the model choose.

fields.name: ratio
fields.title: Aspect Ratio
fields.description: Aspect ratio of the output video. 'adaptive' lets the API choose.

fields.name: generate_audio
fields.title: Generate Audio
fields.description: Native synchronized audio (voice, sound effects, music).

fields.name: web_search
fields.title: Web Search
fields.description: Use web search to ground generation in real-time info.

fields.name: last_image

fields.description: Optional ending frame.

fields.name: duration
fields.title: Duration (seconds)
fields.description: Video duration in seconds. -1 lets the model choose.

fields.name: ratio
fields.title: Aspect Ratio
fields.description: Aspect ratio of the output video. 'adaptive' lets the API choose.

fields.description: Native synchronized audio (voice, sound effects, music).

title: Seedream v5.0 Pro — Text to Image
description: AtlasCloud / ByteDance Seedream v5.0 Pro — flagship next-generation text-to-image with stronger prompt adherence.

fields.name: prompt
fields.title: Prompt
fields.description: The positive prompt for the generation. Recommended length: under 600 English words.

fields.name: size
fields.title: Size
fields.description: Output image size in 'WIDTH*HEIGHT' pixels. Total pixels must stay within [1,048,576 (1024*1024), 4,194,304 (2048*2048)] and aspect ratio within [1/16, 16].

fields.name: output_format
fields.title: Output Format
fields.description: Output image file format. Seedream v5.0 Pro supports both JPEG and PNG output.

title: Seedream v5.0 Pro — Edit
description: AtlasCloud / ByteDance Seedream v5.0 Pro — professional image editing with up to 10 reference images, preserving identity, lighting, and color tones.

fields.name: prompt
fields.title: Prompt
fields.description: The positive prompt for the generation. Recommended length: under 600 English words.

fields.name: images
fields.title: Images
fields.description: The images to edit. Accepts URLs or Base64 data URLs. A maximum of 10 reference images can be uploaded; the first input image is free and each additional input image adds $0.003.

fields.name: size
fields.title: Size
fields.description: Output image size in 'WIDTH*HEIGHT' pixels. Total pixels must stay within [1,048,576 (1024*1024), 4,194,304 (2048*2048)] and aspect ratio within [1/16, 16].

fields.name: output_format
fields.title: Output Format
fields.description: Output image file format. Seedream v5.0 Pro supports both JPEG and PNG output.

fields.title: Prompt

fields.name: size

title: Youchuan v8.1 — Text to Image
description: AtlasCloud / Youchuan v8.1 — generates four images per task with optional native 2K HD.

fields.name: prompt
fields.title: Prompt
fields.description: Natural-language description of the image to generate. Maximum 1024 characters (Youchuan command flags embedded in the prompt are not counted toward the limit).

fields.name: sref
fields.title: Style Reference URL
fields.description: Optional URL of a style-reference image. Must be a publicly reachable https image URL.

fields.name: aspect_ratio
fields.title: Aspect Ratio
fields.description: Aspect ratio of the generated image.

fields.name: hd
fields.title: HD (2K)
fields.description: Enable native 2K HD generation. Costs 1.5x.

fields.name: stylize
fields.title: Stylize
fields.description: Controls how strongly the model's default aesthetic is applied (0-1000).

fields.name: chaos
fields.title: Chaos
fields.description: Higher values produce more unusual and varied results (0-100).

fields.name: weird
fields.title: Weird
fields.description: Makes results quirky and unconventional (0-3000).

fields.name: quality
fields.title: Quality
fields.description: Controls image detail. 4 = higher detail at the same price (slower). v8.1 supports 1 or 4 only.

fields.description: Input image to re-imagine. A publicly reachable https image URL (or upload). Each task returns 4 images.

fields.name: sref
fields.title: Style Reference URL
fields.description: Optional URL of a style-reference image. Must be a publicly reachable https image URL.

fields.name: aspect_ratio
fields.title: Aspect Ratio
fields.description: Aspect ratio of the generated image.

fields.description: Enable native 2K HD generation. Costs 1.5x.

fields.description: Controls how strongly the model's default aesthetic is applied (0-1000).

fields.name: chaos

fields.title: Weird
fields.description: Makes results quirky and unconventional (0-3000).

fields.name: quality
fields.title: Quality
fields.description: Controls image detail. 4 = higher detail at the same price (slower). v8.1 supports 1 or 4 only.

fields.description: Enable native 2K HD generation. Costs 1.5x.

title: Seedance 2.0 Mini — Image to Video
description: AtlasCloud / ByteDance Seedance 2.0 Mini — lightweight first/last-frame animation with native audio.

fields.title: Prompt
fields.description: Text prompt describing the desired video motion. Optional but recommended.

fields.name: image
fields.title: Image
fields.description: First-frame image URL, Base64, or asset reference (asset://<ASSET_ID>). The video starts from this image.

fields.name: last_image
fields.title: Last Frame (optional)
fields.description: Last-frame image URL, Base64, or asset reference. The video transitions from the first frame to this last frame. Same format requirements as image.

fields.name: duration
fields.title: Duration (seconds)
fields.description: Video duration in seconds (4-15), or -1 for model to choose automatically.

fields.name: resolution
fields.title: Resolution
fields.description: Video resolution.

fields.name: ratio
fields.title: Aspect Ratio
fields.description: Aspect ratio. 'adaptive' matches the first frame image aspect ratio.

fields.name: generate_audio
fields.title: Generate Audio
fields.description: Whether to generate synchronized audio.

fields.name: watermark
fields.title: Watermark
fields.description: Whether to add a watermark.

title: Seedance 2.0 Mini — Reference to Video
description: AtlasCloud / ByteDance Seedance 2.0 Mini multimodal — generates video from reference images, videos, and/or audio. Refer to inputs in your prompt as 'image 1', 'video 1', etc.

fields.name: prompt
fields.title: Prompt
fields.description: Text prompt describing the desired video. References like 'image 1', 'video 1' refer to inputs in order.

fields.name: reference_images
fields.title: Reference Images
fields.description: Reference image URLs, Base64, or asset references (asset://<ASSET_ID>). Up to 9 images for character/style/scene references, video editing, or combined generation.

fields.name: reference_videos
fields.title: Reference Videos
fields.description: Reference video URLs or asset references for video editing, extension, or multimodal generation. Up to 3 videos, total duration <= 15s.

fields.name: reference_audios
fields.title: Reference Audios
fields.description: Reference audio URLs, Base64, or asset references. Must include at least 1 reference video or image. Formats: wav/mp3, duration [2,15]s, max 15MB each.

fields.name: duration
fields.title: Duration (seconds)
fields.description: Video duration in seconds (4-15), or -1 for model to choose automatically.

fields.name: resolution
fields.title: Resolution
fields.description: Video resolution.

fields.name: ratio
fields.title: Aspect Ratio
fields.description: Aspect ratio. 'adaptive' uses primary media aspect ratio.

fields.name: generate_audio
fields.title: Generate Audio
fields.description: Whether to generate synchronized audio.

fields.name: watermark
fields.title: Watermark
fields.description: Whether to add a watermark.

title: Wan 2.7 — Text to Video
description: AtlasCloud / Alibaba Wan 2.7 — generates video from text with multi-shot narrative, audio generation, and sound-image synchronization.

fields.name: prompt
fields.title: Prompt
fields.description: Text prompt describing the video content. Maximum length is 5000 characters.

fields.name: negative_prompt
fields.title: Negative Prompt
fields.description: Text describing elements to exclude from the video. Maximum length is 500 characters.

fields.name: audio
fields.title: Audio (optional)
fields.description: URL of an audio file to use as the video soundtrack. Supported formats: wav, mp3. Duration: 2–30 seconds. Maximum file size: 15 MB. The alias `audio_url` is also accepted.

fields.name: resolution
fields.title: Resolution
fields.description: Output video resolution. 720P and 1080P are native Wan 2.7 outputs. Choose 1080P-SR for sharper HD detail, cleaner edges, and better texture retention. For the same duration, 1080P…

fields.name: ratio
fields.title: Aspect Ratio
fields.description: Aspect ratio of the generated video.

fields.name: duration
fields.title: Duration (seconds)
fields.description: Video duration in seconds. Longer duration increases cost.

fields.name: prompt_extend
fields.title: Expand Prompt
fields.description: Whether to use AI to enhance the prompt for better video quality. Increases generation time.

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Random seed for video generation. Range: 0 to 2147483647. Use -1 for a random seed.

title: Wan 2.7 — Image to Video

fields.title: Last Frame (optional)
fields.description: Last-frame image URL for end-frame control. Use it with `image` to generate a start-to-end transition, or with `video` to continue a clip toward a target ending frame. Supported fo…

fields.name: video
fields.title: Video (optional)
fields.description: Video clip URL for video continuation modes. The model extends the content of this clip. `last_image` can be added for end-frame control. Supported formats: mp4, mov. Duration: 2–1…

fields.name: audio
fields.title: Audio (optional)
fields.description: Driving audio URL for image-based generation modes. The model uses this audio to drive lip-sync or action-matched video generation. Supported only with `image`, or with `image` and…

fields.title: Resolution

fields.name: duration
fields.title: Duration (seconds)
fields.description: Video duration in seconds. Longer duration increases cost.

fields.name: prompt_extend
fields.title: Expand Prompt
fields.description: Whether to use AI to enhance the prompt for better video quality. Increases generation time.

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Random seed for video generation. Range: 0 to 2147483647. Use -1 for a random seed.

title: Grok Imagine Image Quality — Edit

fields.name: prompt
fields.default: Render this as a pencil sketch with detailed shading.
fields.title: Prompt
fields.description: Editing instruction. For multi-image references, cite each input as <IMAGE_0>, <IMAGE_1>, ...

fields.name: image_urls
fields.title: Images
fields.description: Source images. Each entry is either a public URL or a base64-encoded data URI (e.g. `data:image/png;base64,...`). At least one image is required; each input is billed at $0.01.

fields.name: num_images
fields.title: Number of Images
fields.description: Number of edited images to generate. Each output image is billed separately.

fields.name: aspect_ratio
fields.title: Aspect Ratio
fields.description: Aspect ratio of the edited image. With a single source image, the output respects the input's aspect ratio regardless of this value. `auto` lets the model pick.

fields.name: resolution
fields.title: Resolution
fields.description: Output resolution. 1k = 1024x1024 ($0.05/image), 2k = 2048x2048 ($0.07/image).
